arts.ttl: Will Sir Alex Ferguson be at Man United vs Brentford after Old Trafford exit?
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as the side are back in action on Saturday, just days after it was revealed that Sir Alex Ferguson will be leaving his ambassadorial role.

arts.ttl: Man Utd receive timely fitness boost as long-term absentee nears return
arts.sum: Manchester United left-back Tyrell Malacia is potentially just two or three weeks away from making his long-awaited return to action after more than year out injured. Erik ten Hag's team start November with the visit of Chelsea to Old Trafford, followed by PAOK in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag slams 'fairytales' about Man Utd future
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has hit out at the speculation surrounding his Manchester United future, insisting everyone at the club remains on the same page. Back in front of the media ahead of United's visit from Brentford on Saturday, Ten Hag voiced his frustrations at what he claimed were attempts to divide the club.

arts.ttl: Wirtz battle heats up as Man Utd enter race
arts.sum: The transfer battle to sign Florian Wirtz is heating up, with Manchester United now also among his suitors, according to German media. Sky Germany has now revealed the state of play regarding Wirtz's future, providing surprising updates on some of his suitors and making it clear that this transfer saga will be anything but a straightforward affair.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid dressing room reaction to Zinedine Zidane speaks volumes for Manchester United
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is currently struggling to inspire his Manchester United squad – something that Zinedine Zidane never had an issue with at Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag decision, Ratcliffe choice – Man United given clear Thomas Frank next boss verdict
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Jake Stokes, Bruna Reis, Isaac Seelochan, Isaac Johnson, Jack Flintham, Kieran Horn)
arts.sum: Thomas Frank has the chance to impress higher-ups at Old Trafford when Manchester United lock horns with Brentford on Saturday afternoon

arts.ttl: Former Manchester United defender was 'very close' to losing thumb after freak injury
arts.sum: The former Manchester United defender was absent for Ipswich's defeat to Man City earlier this month

arts.ttl: Man United at risk of equalling 45-year losing run in Brentford Premier League clash
arts.sum: Manchester United will be looking to avoid equalling a 45-year losing record when they face Brentford at Old Trafford in the Premier League on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: I believe Thomas Frank would get the best out of Manchester United stars - he can deal with egos
arts.sum: Pressure is growing on Erik ten Hag after Manchester United won just two of their first seven Premier League games

arts.ttl: 'Special' Jadon Sancho given Chelsea plan to prove Manchester United and Erik ten Hag wrong
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as the winger left the club in the summer, joining
